description: Lexeme conflict finding must be parsed with evidence packets.

input.compatibilityReportRaw: { "findings": [{ "findingId": "f002", "kind": "lexeme_conflict", "severity": "error", "title": "Duplicate lexeme form", "description": "Lexeme 'abc' has conflicting glosses between entries lex-1 and lex-2", "evidencePackets": [{ "id": "ep1", "sourceType": "lexeme", "sourceId": "lex-1", "quote": "abc (n.) greeting", "confidence": 0.95, "reasonCode": "duplicate_form" }, { "id": "ep2", "sourceType": "lexeme", "sourceId": "lex-2", "quote": "abc (v.) to greet", "confidence": 0.95, "reasonCode": "duplicate_form" }], "recommendedAction": "Merge or disambiguate entries", "adoptionCandidateId": "adopt-merge-abc" }], "summary": "One lexeme conflict blocks clean FLEx export.", "exportTargets": ["flex"] }
